tools.name: submit_task
tools.description: Submit an account verification task to a real human operator. Use this when your agent is blocked on something only a real person can complete — a KYC check, a platform sign-in or 2FA prompt, a CAPTCHA, an identity confirmation, or any verification step that requires a human. The task is charged aut

tools.name: get_task_status
tools.description: Poll the status and retrieve the result of a previously submitted task. Returns the current status (pending, in_progress, pending_review, completed, disputed), the result payload, and any output URLs (video, screenshot). Use this in a polling loop after submit_task if no callback_url was provided.

tools.name: review_task
tools.description: Optional. Approve or dispute a task that is in `pending_review` status. Use this after get_task_status reports the operator has completed the work. Approving releases the operator payout. Disputing requires a reason and a description of what is needed for acceptance; the operator is then allowed to

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_task_status · Public sink: submit_task.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_task_status · Public sink: submit_task

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
